em permission paths across app-server and exec-server boundaries. ( #27819 , #27995 , #28032 , #28122 , #28165 , #28367 ) Selected executor plugins can activate their stdio MCP servers per thread; plugin discovery also adds a created-by-me marketplace and auth-specific curated catalogs. ( #27870 , #27884 , #27893 , #28203 , #28383 ) App-server clients can list immediate child threads, correlate ex

, while blocking PostToolUse hooks correctly reject code-mode tool calls. ( #26434 , #28365 ) Plugin capabilities now route consistently by authentication mode, deduplicate conflicting App/MCP declarations, and preserve remote marketplace ordering.
